name: Sign Message Demo
description: Sign an arbitrary message using the connected Safe wallet.

name: ERC20 Transfer Demo
description: Send an ERC20 token transfer via the connected Safe wallet.

name: XMTP Circles Demo
description: Enables XMTP messaging for Safe wallets with native Circles support, allowing users to coordinate and message directly within a secure chat.

name: Coinflip Game
description: A simple coin flip mini app game.

name: VibeVote
description: Onchain applause meter for hackathon demos. Tap to send 1 CRC to the project you like. Live scoreboard, real-time ranking, winner reveal.

name: MiniApps Org Manager
description: Builder-focused setup tool for miniapp organizations, including org creation, accepted CRC configuration, signer management, and withdrawals.
